data.title: Bernstein Projects IREN's AI Cloud Revenue to Hit $3.7 Billion
data.description: Bernstein analysts have projected that IREN's AI cloud division could achieve an annual revenue run rate of $3.7 billion as the company transitions from Bitcoin mining. According to NS3.AI, the analysts highlighted that a five-year capacity agreement with Microsoft and customer prepayments are facilitating the infrastructure development necessary for this growth.

data.title: White House Considers Proposal from Iran
data.description: White House spokesperson Karoline Leavitt announced that the administration is currently reviewing a proposal from Iran. According to NS3.AI, Leavitt mentioned that U.S. President Donald Trump is expected to address the matter in the near future.

data.title: Initia Extends Vesting Cliff for INIT Tokens to April 2027
data.description: Initia has announced an extension of the vesting cliff for INIT tokens allocated to early investors, founders, and the team by one year, moving the date to April 2027. According to NS3.AI, this decision underscores the long-term commitment of its backers and contributors. The team plans to dedicate the upcoming year to app development and initiatives aimed at enhancing the value of INIT.

data.title: Launch: Aven Introduces Bitcoin Visa Card with $1 Million Credit Line
data.description: Aven has unveiled a new Bitcoin Visa Card, offering a credit line backed by bitcoin collateral of up to $1 million. According to NS3.AI, the card provides fixed-rate, fixed-term loans with a duration of up to 10 years at an annual percentage rate (APR) of 7.99%. To secure the credit line, borrowers are required to deposit bitcoin collateral with BitGo.

data.title: MARA Foundation Launches with $100,000 Community Grant Vote
data.description: MARA has introduced the MARA Foundation during the Bitcoin 2026 conference, initiating a $100,000 community grant vote. According to NS3.AI, the foundation aims to support Bitcoin network security, open-source software, self-custody access, public policy, and education. The grant vote includes projects such as SateNet, the 256 Foundation, and Libreria de Satoshi. Voting is open until April 29 at 3:00 PM PST.

data.title: Bitcoin Self-Custody Advocated as Civil Liberty at Bitcoin 2026
data.description: At Bitcoin 2026, Congressman Nick Begich, alongside Joe Kelly and Zach Herbert, emphasized the importance of safeguarding bitcoin self-custody as a civil liberty. According to NS3.AI, Begich presented the Bitcoin Act during the event, advocating for congressional action to ensure protections are established, highlighting that executive orders can be subject to reversal.

data.title: Trump Eases Stance on Prediction Markets Amid Legal Battles
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump has moderated his criticism of prediction markets, a sector with a weekly trading volume exceeding $7 billion. According to NS3.AI, Trump expressed uncertainty about his position, acknowledging that some "very smart" individuals support the industry. This shift in tone comes just two days after he labeled the sector as part of a "casino." The comments arise as prediction market platforms face legal challenges regarding whether event contracts are subject to federal Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) regulations or state gambling laws.

data.title: Intel's Rally Faces Potential Pullback Amid High RSI and Rising Put-Call Ratios
data.description: Intel's stock closed at $82.54 on Friday, marking a significant increase after nearly doubling over the past month. According to NS3.AI, traders are now speculating whether this upward momentum can push the stock price to $100 before the end of May. The stock maintains a bull flag pattern above $64.84, but several indicators suggest a potential pullback. The Relative Strength Index (RSI) stands at 80.92, indicating overbought conditions, while thinning trading volume and increasing put-call ratios further highlight the risk of a price correction.

data.title: Metaplanet's Advertising Strategy Amid Stock Price Decline
data.description: Metaplanet is employing high-profile advertising campaigns as its share price remains approximately 25% lower this year. According to NS3.AI, the Japanese Bitcoin treasury firm has recently showcased advertisements on the Las Vegas Sphere and sponsored Bitcoin-focused events in Tokyo, Las Vegas, and Hong Kong. Despite these efforts, Metaplanet's stock is trading at a 36% discount compared to the value of its Bitcoin holdings. Some supporters have expressed criticism regarding the company's spending on these promotional activities.

data.title: Ray Dalio: Persistent Inflation and Slowing Economic Growth Demand Caution
data.description: Ray Dalio, the founder of Bridgewater Associates, emphasized the need for policymakers to exercise caution in light of ongoing inflationary pressures coupled with a slowdown in economic growth. According to Jin10, Dalio highlighted these challenges as significant factors influencing economic policy decisions.

data.title: Curve Founder Proposes Market-Based Solution for LlamaLend's Debt Issue
data.description: Curve founder Michael Egorov has put forward a proposal to tackle approximately $700,000 of bad debt in LlamaLend’s CRV-long market. According to NS3.AI, the plan involves packaging the affected lender positions into a tokenized vault, allowing traders to price them through a dedicated Curve pool. This approach aims to address the debt issue without requiring Curve DAO to cover the shortfall.

data.title: Nvidia Shares Surge Over 2% to Record High
data.description: Nvidia's stock price increased by more than 2%, reaching an intraday record high of $212.6, according to Odaily. The company's market capitalization during the trading session was valued at 5.17 trillion dollars (5.17万亿美元).

data.title: Solana developers announce plans to combat quantum threats, including the introduction of the Falcon digital signature scheme.
data.description: The Solana Foundation announced that its core development team, Anza, and Jump Crypto's Firedancer have reached an agreement on potential post-quantum solutions, planning to introduce a new digital signature scheme called Falcon. While the threat of quantum computing is not expected to materialize for several years, Solana has developed a phased upgrade roadmap. This plan includes ongoing research into Falcon and other alternatives, introducing post-quantum solutions to new wallets if necessary, and ultimately migrating existing wallets. Currently, Blueshift's quantum-resistant primitive Winternitz Vault has been running on Solana for over two years. The Solana Foundation stated that the network's high-speed, low-latency design is compatible with such schemes, and the migration is not expected to have a significant impact on performance.

data.title: Nvidia shares rose more than 2%, hitting an all-time high of $212.60 during the session.
data.description: According to Gate data, Nvidia rose more than 2%, hitting an all-time high of $212.6 during the session, with a market capitalization of $5.17 trillion.

data.title: AI TRENDS | Google Employees Urge CEO to Reject AI Use in U.S. Defense
data.description: On April 28, hundreds of AI researchers from Google, a subsidiary of Alphabet, signed a letter urging Alphabet CEO Sundar Pichai to reject the use of the company's AI systems in classified U.S. defense missions. According to Jin10, the statement expressed concern over ongoing negotiations between Google and the U.S. Department of Defense. The letter comes amid legal disputes between the Pentagon and Anthropic over the application of AI in military settings. The Pentagon is seeking to remove Anthropic and its Claude AI tool from the U.S. defense supply chain and is looking for new tech giants as AI partners.

data.title: To avoid conflict with Trump, NATO is considering canceling its annual summit.
data.description: NATO is considering ending its recent practice of holding an annual summit, according to six sources. Since 2021, NATO leaders have met every summer, with another meeting scheduled for July 7-8 this year in Ankara, Turkey. However, according to a senior European official and five diplomats (all from NATO member states), some member states are actively pushing to slow down the summit's pace. One diplomat stated that the summit, originally scheduled for 2027 in Albania, is likely to be postponed until that autumn; furthermore, NATO is considering completely cancelling the summit in 2028—the year of the US presidential election and the last full calendar year of Trump's term. (Jinshi)

data.title: DeFi United has raised over $300 million.
data.description: Circle Ventures, Consensys, and Joseph Lubin have announced their support for the DeFi United initiative, aimed at mitigating losses from the Kelp DAO vulnerability. Circle Ventures is supporting the ecosystem by purchasing AAVE tokens. Consensys and Ethereum co-founder Joseph Lubin confirmed they will provide 30,000 ETH to DeFi United. DeFi United has now raised over 132,000 ETH, with a total value exceeding $300 million. The funds will be used to cover bad debts caused by attackers minting uncollateralized rsETH through the LayerZero bridge and lending assets on Aave. Previously, Aave had proposed a donation of 25,000 ETH, while Lido DAO, Ether.fi, and Kelp had proposed or pledged donations of 2,500 ETH, 5,000 ETH, and 2,000 ETH, respectively.

data.title: OpenAI Faces Scrutiny Over Handling of ChatGPT Account Linked to Mass Shooting
data.description: Sam Altman has issued an apology following OpenAI's failure to notify law enforcement about a ChatGPT account associated with the suspect in the February Tumbler Ridge mass shooting, which resulted in eight fatalities. According to NS3.AI, OpenAI stated that the account was banned in June 2025 due to activities related to promoting violence. However, the company determined that the situation did not meet its criteria for a credible or imminent threat of serious physical harm.

data.title: Ripple Expands Offerings with RLUSD and Custody Services
data.description: Ripple has broadened its range of services beyond its well-known cryptocurrency, XRP. According to NS3.AI, the company now includes the XRP Ledger, RippleNet, the RLUSD stablecoin, and custody services for financial institutions in its portfolio. The RLUSD stablecoin was introduced in December 2024, and DBS has been identified as a client for Ripple's custody services.

data.title: Benchmark Sets $3 Price Target for DDC Enterprise
data.description: Benchmark has assigned a Buy rating to DDC Enterprise, setting a price target of $3. According to NS3.AI, DDC Enterprise reported holding 2,383 BTC as of April 21 and has set a goal to increase its holdings to 5,000 BTC by the end of this year.
